spec_match.rationale: The heatmap records only qualifying soft-navigation entries and surfaces navigationType, interactionId, navigationId, duration, and largestInteractionContentfulPaint in the live readout.

interactive.rationale: Route controls, navigationType controls, qualifying-entry, URL-only, paint-only, burst, and reset actions update the table and failure log live.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page now focuses on route latency aggregation for SoftNavigationEntry.duration and explicitly excludes failed heuristic candidates from the heatmap.

edge_cases.rationale: URL-only and paint-only modes show no-entry outcomes, while burst mode covers repeated route samples and navigationType mix.

references.rationale: The page now includes the required ChromeStatus feature 5144837209194496 link plus WICG and Chrome documentation links.

design_system.rationale: The page uses CSS variables, accessible pressed-state controls, no raw colors, no inline handlers, and no inline style attributes.

summary: The heatmap now has the required reference link, stable in-concept URL updates, qualifying-entry aggregation, and explicit no-entry failure logging.
